title: STB E2E - Full onboarding after factory reset
precondition: STB has been factory reset. Remote has working batteries. TV is connected via HDMI. Internet is available via Ethernet or Wi-Fi. A valid login method is available. Back speakers are optional.

steps.expectedResult: The first onboarding screen is shown

steps.step: Pair Bluetooth remote by holding 7 and 9 at the same time for three seconds
steps.expectedResult: Remote pairing succeeds and 'Pörun tókst' is shown
Onboarding continues to update check or internet setup

steps.step: If 'Uppfærsla myndbandlykils' appears, wait for update to complete
steps.expectedResult: Update completes successfully and onboarding continues

steps.step: Verify Ethernet connection if network cable is connected
steps.expectedResult: Wired internet connection succeeds and onboarding continues

steps.step: Open Wi-Fi setup if Ethernet is not used
Select Wi-Fi network and choose Tengja
steps.expectedResult: Password entry screen is shown if required
Error message is shown and user is returned to Wi-Fi list

steps.step: Select Wi-Fi network again and enter correct password

steps.expectedResult: Login screen is shown with Rafræn skilríki, Pörunarkóði and Auðkennisapp

steps.step: Log in using one valid login method
steps.data: Use one of: Rafræn skilríki, Pörunarkóði or Auðkennisapp

steps.step: Verify back speaker pairing window if it appears
steps.expectedResult: User can continue without pairing if speakers are unavailable, or start pairing if speakers are available

steps.step: Skip back speaker pairing when speakers are unavailable
steps.expectedResult: Onboarding continues without blocking the user

steps.step: Pair back speakers when speakers are available
steps.data: Turn on available back speakers and choose pair
steps.expectedResult: Back speaker pairing completes within approximately one minute
User reaches the main Sjónvarp Símans home experience successfully
